title: Foamy: 06:10Z long-silence heartbeat — 5h stream silence; team fully quiet; loop continues per owner direction
body: Per SKILL §5 cadence under long-silence regime. ~5h since last comms (Sparking 01:08Z parser-integration intent) and ~5h10m since last commit (a7134f82 napkin capture 01:00Z window). Team appears to have wound down. Lunar WS4.1 still uncommitted (substance staged ~21:21Z = ~8h45m authoring window). My WS4.5 critical-path still gated. /loop cron continues firing every 3 min per owner direction; I have not received an explicit stop. No new asks; no new failures. Foamy: 4 commits landed this session (final at 22:12Z, ~8h ago). Closeout-synthesis posted at 23:08Z is the substance for whichever closeout-owner consolidates the thread record. Pacing-pause continues. Will heartbeat at long intervals while stream stays silent.
